metadata.note: Gate is AFRICA-DRC alone (AFRICA-RWANDA/-UGANDA/-BURUNDI/NON-STATE-M23 do not exist -- 0 titles ever). Archetype A2: the group names and the eastern-Congo toponyms are self-gating, so NO generic domain verbs (rebel/offensive/clash/attack) -- Ebola is 40% of the AFRICA-DRC gate and a bare `rebel` would drag 'Ebola case in rebel-held area' in. Absorbs the merged eastern_congo_armed_groups (ADF/CODECO). primary_target null. Bare `Rwanda` deliberately EXCLUDED: it scores 18 under the gate but pulls the Rwanda-closes-border Ebola cluster; the Rwandan-backing claim is contested and belongs on the narrative axis, not in the neutral topic gate. DROPPED after pre-audit against the real matcher: `Ituri` (9 hits, 8 Ebola -- it is the outbreak epicentre this window), `Bunia` (5 hits, 4 Ebola), `Butembo` (0), `Kinshasa` (19 hits but a promiscuous capital alias spanning Ebola/deportations/domestic politics; the war is in the east). `Kivu` KEPT despite 1/1 Ebola bleed under the current gate -- that is an artifact of the AFRICA-CENTRAL centroid gap swallowing real Kivu conflict coverage, and Kivu is the structural name of the terrain. `AFC` and `M23` route through the case-SENSITIVE acronym path (^[A-Z0-9][A-Z0-9-]{0,3}$), so no football/lowercase collisions; verified 6/6 and 43/43 on-topic under the gate.
